_doc: v11 cycle-mechanism scores. Sprint 1 (Valuation/Credit/Growth) reads indicator percentiles directly from methodology_calibration_v11.json with direction encoding (high/low/bidir_top/bidir_bottom). Sprint 2 (Funding/Liquidity & Policy/Positioning & Breadth) computes from indicator_history.json post-2011 sample. Refreshed nightly by scripts/compute_v11_mechanisms.py at 22:30 UTC weekdays.
